meta.audit_scope: read-only exhaustive inspection of Star Screener monorepo
limitations: web tools were blocked in the moat-scanner sandbox — every competitor claim in moat.json is tagged LIVE_CHECK_REQUIRED and must be re-verified with live URLs before external quotation
backtest against historical GH Archive was not run (no BigQuery access); trend-engine backtest is based on the code's behavior against the existing .data/ JSONL state only

headline.one_sentence: StarScreener is a well-architected 1-day-old prototype that ships a convincing UI on top of an almost-entirely-unfired pipeline: no cron scheduler is wired, no alerts are delivered, the AI classifier is stale, the momentum math has untested components, and ~96% of seeded repos have flat-zero sparklines because the 400-page stargazer cap makes them invisible.
headline.ai_recall_estimated: ~35% today, ~55-65% after a fresh pipeline run, ~75% ceiling without seed additions

subsystems.status: POLICY-ONLY, not wired (no vercel crons, no GH Actions, no railway.toml, no Procfile)
shipped; silently truncates on non-2xx (events-backfill.ts:103 `if (!res.ok) break` with no log)

subsystems.wire: HN Algolia + Reddit public JSON + Nitter RSS + GitHub code-search
subsystems.status: live-on-demand only; .data/mentions.jsonl is empty; never persisted

subsystems.wire: JSONL in .data/ via in-memory Map + debounced (2s) atomic rewrite
subsystems.status: works at 1x; breaks at 100x (~1.4GB snapshots file)

subsystems.wire: synchronous recompute of 10 components * weights * modifiers (src/lib/pipeline/scoring/engine.ts:229-239)
subsystems.status: implemented; 0 unit tests on scoring engine; antiSpamDampening=1.0 in every stored row

subsystems.wire: rule-based on topics (+30), description (+15), name (+10), owner (+50) * weight(1.0-2.0)
subsystems.status: implemented; persisted .data/categories.jsonl is stale (predates recent AI-focus seed additions)

subsystems.wire: 8 triggers + cooldown engine in src/lib/pipeline/alerts/; SSE emit server-only; no browser consumer

subsystems.status: alive on Railway, zero browser subscribers

subsystems.wire: 8 read-only discovery tools in mcp/src/server.ts against the REST facade
bin/ss.mjs thin HTTP client (byte-identical to cli/ss.mjs)
subsystems.status: shipped; duplicate file is a drift risk

subsystems.wire: Next.js 15 App Router, React 19, Zustand, Tailwind v4
console.* + one structured JSON log line per cron run; no SDK
subsystems.status: grade D; status endpoint returns 200 on a dead pipeline

sources.failure_mode: 429/5xx retried 3x with exp backoff; 429 cap short-circuits further calls until reset (good)
sources.cost_100x_usd: infeasible on single PAT — needs token pool or GH App

sources.failure_mode: HARD CAP at 400 pages (40k stars) — mega-repos (ollama/langchain/transformers/next.js) invisible to history engine
silently breaks on non-2xx (no counter, no log); reports partial as success
4 hard-coded mirrors probed once at module load; if all down, TWITTER_AVAILABLE=false for lifetime

trend_math.overall_formula: clamp(round1((Σ w_k * c_k) * decayFactor * antiSpamDampening * breakoutMultiplier + quietKillerBonus), 0, 100)
trend_math.normalization: log-normalized for star/fork velocity; linear % for contributor growth; step-function for freshness; clamped linear for mention count and issueActivity
weakest_components: categoryMomentum — 5% weight, defaults to 0 when scoreRepo is called without the pre-pass → silent 5-point hole
issueActivity — linearNorm(openIssues, 0, 200); rewards abandoned bug-swamps equally with healthy-but-busy projects
active_false_positives: MAJOR_VERSION_RE matches pre-release tags like `langchain-core==1.3.0a3` as release_major (already firing in .data/reasons.jsonl line 2)
trend_math.anti_spam_status: code exists (modifiers.ts:64-94) but dampening=1.0 in every stored row across 309 repos — never fires in production data

classifier.mechanism: hybrid (rule engine + curated seed list, but seed is NOT used as a prior — just ingestion ordering)
structural_misses: karpathy/nanoGPT, triton, DeepSeek-V3, whisper.cpp, outlines, meta-llama/llama, llama3 → collapse into devtools:0
anthropics owner prefix lives ONLY in the mcp rule (weight 2.0) → every anthropics SDK/course/cookbook force-classified as MCP

latency.tier_today: hourly (de facto: manual — no cron wired)
latency.evidence: snapshots.jsonl has 4 real fetch-time points (all from one 2026-04-17 manual burst); every other row is a T23:59:59 synthetic backfill. vercel.json = redirects only (no crons), no .github/workflows/*cron*, no railway.toml / Procfile / nixpacks scheduler.
top_choke_points: Stage B: no scheduler wired → effectively infinite
Hot tier cap 50/hr covers only 16% of 309 repos per pass
recomputeAll runs once at batch end — no per-repo micro-recompute
latency.path_to_5min: GitHub Actions */5 cron → /api/cron/ingest?tier=hot + shrink hot to ~50-repo AI watchlist
latency.path_to_seconds: GitHub Events API firehose (already half-exists per commit 77a9cc5) driving pipeline.ingestRepo + recomputeRepo per event, SSE delivery on existing Railway process

cost.at_10x_usd_per_month: still ~$0 in API spend; Railway instance size may need to rise; PAT burns 100% of quota if hot cadence drops under 5 min
cost.at_100x_usd_per_month: infeasible on a single PAT — needs token pool or GitHub App; single-instance JSONL storage blows up (~1.4GB snapshots file); Postgres migration becomes mandatory
primary_cost_risks: Nitter mirrors probed once at module load; no retry on mirror failure

storage.break_at_100x: ~1.4GB → event-loop blocks multi-second, cold-start readFile + 3.6M JSON.parse OOMs a 512MB Railway instance

observability.health_endpoint: /api/pipeline/status — data-counts snapshot, NOT a health check; returns 200 OK on a dead pipeline
observability.minimum_fix_for_operator_signal: add freshness gate to /api/pipeline/status → return 503 when lastRefreshAt > 2 * hotTierCadence; point UptimeRobot/BetterStack at it

alerts.cooldown_scope_bug: rule-global, not per-(rule,repo) — a global rule firing on repo-A silences repo-B for the whole window
alerts.mcp_alert_surface: none — agents can read trends but cannot subscribe/create rules/poll fires
alerts.toggle_persistence_bug: AlertConfig.tsx enabled toggle is local-only — lost on reload (backend has no PUT /rules)

filters.worst_scale_risk: /api/search — per-request toLowerCase() over every repo field; no cached-lowercase column, no index; ~3ms at 300, 300ms+ at 30k with no pagination
silent_liars: rank-climbers meta pill counts reason.codes.includes('rank_jump') but the filter applies rank <= 20 → two different repos
New tab sorts by lastCommit, not createdAt → user asks for new, gets recently-active
fresh-releases has THREE cutoffs (14d / 48h / variable) across filter/count/server paths
home sidebar category compounds onto pre-truncated top-80 → never re-queries that category's actual top movers
timeRange is dead code — stored/toggled, never read
starsRange filters absolute stars; no delta equivalent exists despite UI implying momentum screening

moat.note: web tools blocked — every competitor claim is LIVE_CHECK_REQUIRED
unique_moats_today: SSE live-stream signal feed on a long-lived Railway process
no-mock rule enforced at adapter-construction time
rules-based alert engine with 8 triggers + cooldown (even though delivery is 0%)
composite compound signals (quiet-killer, rank-climber, breakout-multiplier) not present on GH Trending
moat.biggest_gap_to_close: detection latency — we are hourly-manual, competitors are daily; OSSInsight has multi-year historical depth we cannot match on a single PAT
moat.weekend_copy_risk: any team with a GitHub PAT can reimplement the 10-component score; the moat is not the math
asymmetric_opportunities: MCP registry listing — agent-first distribution surface no competitor holds
SVG momentum badge at /badge/:owner/:name.svg — README badges become a viral distribution loop
agent-native webhook bus (alert_triggered over MCP SSE) — no competitor has this
watchlist-driven GitHub Events firehose — sub-minute detection on a curated list
AI-only breakout digest RSS — zero-cost SEO

critical_now: no scheduler wired → pipeline is frozen except for manual triggers
296/309 seeded repos have flat-zero sparklines (40k-star cap + stargazer backfill never re-runs)
persisted .data/categories.jsonl predates the AI-focus seed additions → new AI seeds show as devtools:0
alerts deliver to zero users (no browser SSE consumer, no email, no MCP surface)
rank-climber badge vs filter show different repos
critical_at_scale: search toLowerCase() per-request becomes dominant cost
cooldown scope bug silences legitimate fires on other repos
correctness_debt: src/lib/scoring.ts is 288 LOC of dead code superseded by src/lib/pipeline/scoring/engine.ts
bin/ss.mjs and cli/ss.mjs are byte-identical duplicates
RepoChart forks/contributors curves are scaled off the star sparkline (admitted in code at RepoChart.tsx:316)
rank-change arrow ▲N is fabricated from movementStatus + starsDelta7d magnitude — no stored previousRank
Terminal '#1' uses the row index in the current sort, not repo.rank

top_recommendations_ranked.action: Wire a real scheduler (GitHub Actions */5 cron → /api/cron/ingest?tier=hot) — 1 file, 0 code changes
top_recommendations_ranked.impact: p50 24h → 5-10 min; everything else becomes observable; alerts start firing

top_recommendations_ranked.action: Shrink hot tier to a curated AI-watchlist of ~50 repos
top_recommendations_ranked.impact: hot pass refreshes 100% of watchlist every 5 min; catches breakouts in progress

top_recommendations_ranked.action: Add freshness gate to /api/pipeline/status (503 when lastRefreshAt > 2h)
top_recommendations_ranked.impact: real uptime monitoring without an SDK; operator can finally tell when ingestion is broken

top_recommendations_ranked.action: Add EventSource client in a root layout provider + sonner toast + bell badge for `alert_triggered`
top_recommendations_ranked.impact: alert delivery 0% → real-time on open tabs; uses existing SSE pipe

top_recommendations_ranked.action: Re-run full pipeline ingest to rebuild .data/categories.jsonl with the updated rule set (includes claude-code/MCP/agent seeds)
top_recommendations_ranked.impact: AI recall 35% → 55-65% with zero code change

top_recommendations_ranked.action: Add MCP tools list_alerts + create_alert + subscribe_alerts over SSE
top_recommendations_ranked.impact: agent-native alert surface no competitor has — distribution wedge

top_recommendations_ranked.action: Fix MAJOR_VERSION_RE to reject pre-release tags (1.3.0a3, 2.0.0-rc1)
top_recommendations_ranked.impact: kills an actively-firing false positive in .data/reasons.jsonl

top_recommendations_ranked.action: Cooldown scope → per-(rule,repo) instead of per-rule
top_recommendations_ranked.impact: global rules stop silencing unrelated repos

top_recommendations_ranked.action: Migrate snapshots.jsonl → Postgres (scaffold already exists at src/lib/db/schema.ts:112)
Add Resend sender called from pipeline.ts right after evaluateAllRules
top_recommendations_ranked.impact: durable alert channel; RESEND_API_KEY already declared in env

top_recommendations_ranked.action: Fix rank-climber badge vs filter inconsistency (pick one source)
Delete src/lib/scoring.ts dead code + dedupe bin/ss.mjs vs cli/ss.mjs
Remove RepoChart forks/contributors synthetic curves (admit real data only per no-mock rule)
Add X-RateLimit-Remaining surface to StatsBar (operator signal without admin page)
